title: Mark09 is a Vessel of 5th Adam
display_title: Mark09 is a Vessel of 5th Adam
wikitext: []: Mark.09 is a Vessel of 5th Adam             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sat Sep 25, 2021 4:39 am Ok, is theory is partially confirmed but we do not know to which assigned Adams they belonged EVA Marks series from Mark.09 to Mark.12. So presents my theory which it probably reliable. Mark.09 is a Vessel of 5th Adam Ok, Mark.09 is vessel of 5th Adam, why but, beacuse looks like different of rest Mark series, when Mark.09 left possesion by unknown forces, then Misato says is a beacoming vessel of 5th Adam , why the 5th, as already Mark.09 looks like diffrent of rest Mark series, it suggests it who's like diffrent of true heads of rest Mark series, he has horn and many eyes also is black and has scythe, which rest Mark series not hassed (His head later used to true heads of rest Mark series). This the facts confirmed my theory, Interestingly Mark.09 was a piloted by Rei Ayanami and rest of Mark series piloted by Advanced clone version, but more on that later. Mark.09-A, 10, 11 and 12 is a Vessels of rest Adams https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QAL_GYvMp2j7qc5fUYadf6tjcJDwJVLz/view (sorry but Drive Google does not support img code] Ok, now interesing part. In last movie stayed confirmed that rest of Mark series are vessels of Adams but never Mark.09 don't mentioned (original not A version), in certein scene, Mark series shows real face who's looks like possesion version of Mark.09 but there are not horn. This Mark EVAs looks like diffrent of original vessel, alls looks identically but differents only colors, what they can mean colors. Propraly means colors of Adams or the original pilots of EVAs, Mark.10 has red color (mean Asuka), Mark.11 has blue color (mean Shinji), Mark.12 has white (mean Rei), but what means yellow colors of Mark.09-A? I don't know but problaly means Kaworu or Mari but assigned color of Kaworu was black, and Mari is pink. Mark.09-A colors means original colors of Mark.09 but maybe is reincarnation. BUT what they have in common colors of rest Mark series with pilot plugsuit colors. In another theory, The original pilots are reincarnations of Adams, but big diffrent, Rei is reincarnated version of Lilith. Propaly colors also means something else but nothing does not come in my head. Rei Ayanami and her clone are vessels Is theory also interesing, in all Mark series models from Mark.09 to Mark.12 are piloted is Rei Ayanami and her clones. Rei (or another clone) she dressed black plugsuit who's compones with possesion Mark.09, Advanced Ayanami series clones dont dressed plugsuit instead of this they are naked, probaly symbolizes that 5th Adam is leader of group and rest Adams are decent. Thanks of all.
